# Chapter 5: Differentiation  (~110 pp)
- 5.1 The derivative as rate (12)
- 5.2 Rules: product, chain, quotient, implicit (15)
- 5.3 Higher-order derivatives (10)
- 5.4 Local linearisation (15)
- 5.5 Mean value theorem and L'Hopital (10)
- 5.6 Optimisation of one variable (12)
- 5.7 Numerical differentiation, why it is hard (12)
- 5.8 Failure section: discontinuities, kinks, derivatives that do not exist (12)
- 5.9 Worked examples across domains (12)

**Archetype**: optimisation, transport (gradient as flux). **Project**: numerically differentiate noisy data; defend a smoothing strategy. **Exercises**: 40.
